ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is associated with */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college the player attended */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "salary_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player's salary among all players */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's information */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's information */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the college was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the college's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Salary amount */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract details */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the salary record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free-throw shooting percentage */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal shooting percentage */,
  "minutes_played_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started in the season */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is contracted with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "total_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the contract */,
  "guaranteed_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the contract guaranteed */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email of the player's agent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contract details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return date from the injury */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the injury record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, team staff, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
